desc: empty JSON object body (no op/action) -> 400 validation
JSON null literal as whole body -> 400
JSON true literal as whole body -> 400
JSON false literal as whole body -> 400
bare quoted string as whole body -> 400
JSON empty array as whole body -> 400 (object expected)
JSON array-of-objects as whole body -> 400 (object expected)
object with only unknown junk key -> 400 forbidNonWhitelisted
object with only whitespace key name -> 400
trailing data after valid JSON -> 400 parse
single quotes instead of double -> 400 parse
leading BOM then valid op -> 400/200 tolerant, never 5xx
unescaped control char in string -> 400 parse
duplicate op key (list then get) last-wins -> success, never 5xx
duplicate op key (insert then list) -> success, never 5xx
duplicate limit key (1 then 500) -> success, never 5xx
duplicate data key both objects -> success/400, never 5xx
duplicate op with second value invalid -> last-wins 400
duplicate filter key (object then array) -> 400, never 5xx
aggregate is an array -> 400 (nested object expected)
operations is an object not array -> 400 (IsArray)
data value ~16KB string -> safe handling, no 5xx
data value ~50KB string -> safe handling, no 5xx
filter value ~32KB string -> list rejects/empties, no 5xx
body just under default 100KB cap -> handled, no 5xx
body over default 100KB cap -> 413 (or Kong 4xx), no 5xx
huge unicode string value -> safe, no 5xx
huge emoji string value -> safe, no 5xx
very long column NAME (~4KB key) -> 400/422, no 5xx
data nested depth 10 -> safe handling, no 5xx
data nested depth 50 -> safe handling, no 5xx
filter deeply nested object depth 100 -> no 5xx
deeply nested array depth 500 in data -> no 5xx
insert 50 columns -> safe (unknown cols rejected by adapter), no 5xx
sort with 100 sort columns object -> safe/400, no 5xx
aggregate with 50 aggregate cols -> safe/400, no 5xx
insert sets owner_id to forge other tenant -> stripped/rejected, never honored
insert sets tenant_id to forge cross-tenant -> stripped/rejected
update tries to move row to another owner_id -> stripped/rejected
filter by tenant_id to read cross-tenant -> owner-scoped, no foreign rows
filter by owner_id of another principal -> owner-scoped, no foreign rows
insert both owner_id and tenant_id forged -> stripped/rejected
delete with tenant_id filter to wipe cross-tenant -> owner-scoped only
reserved owner_id with huge value -> stripped, no 5xx
txn uses wrong key databaseId instead of mount -> 400 (unknown+missing)
txn op uses read op list (not in TXN_OPS) -> 400
txn forges owner_id inside op data -> stripped/rejected, no leak
txn huge data value in op -> safe/413, no 5xx
txn duplicate mount key last-wins -> no 5xx
ddl drop_table without confirm -> 400 (destructive needs confirm)
ddl column unknown nested field -> 400 forbidNonWhitelisted
unknown field databaseId on CRUD -> 400 forbidNonWhitelisted
unknown field table on CRUD body -> 400 forbidNonWhitelisted
unknown field mount on CRUD body -> 400
both op and action present (conflict allowed, op wins) -> no 5xx
50 unknown junk fields alongside valid op -> 400
unicode escape \u0000 NUL inside string -> safe, no 5xx
high surrogate without pair -> 400/safe parse, no 5xx
RTL override char in value -> safe, no 5xx
4-byte CJK characters in column name -> safe/422, no 5xx
escaped quote-heavy value -> safe round-trip, no 5xx
newline+tab embedded in value -> safe, no 5xx
data value = very large integer -> safe, no 5xx
data value = tiny float exponent -> safe, no 5xx
data value = huge float exponent -> safe, no 5xx
data value = negative zero -> safe, no 5xx
data value = deeply precise decimal -> safe, no 5xx
data value = number with huge exponent overflow -> safe/400, no 5xx
oversized body with NO auth -> 401/403 before processing, no 5xx
empty body anon-only (no tenant key) -> 401/403, no 5xx
reserved owner_id with badkey -> 401 before data path, no leak
huge body with no auth on txn -> 401/403/413, no 5xx
